message: Then you might already have some good habits in place. That’ll help a lot. But they did say postsecondary is even more demanding—like, double the study time we’re used to.
Wow. That’s kind of overwhelming. I already feel maxed out sometimes.
Same. That’s why they suggested building a weekly schedule and blocking off time for everything—classes, study, even meals and breaks. It helps you see how your week really fills up.
